name: Graham Defensive Investor Screen
description: 10 criteria from Benjamin Graham's The Intelligent Investor — defensive investor approach

criteria.name: Net Current Assets > Long-term Debt
criteria.description: Net current asset value exceeds long-term borrowings

criteria.name: Positive Earnings
criteria.description: Positive earnings in all available years (up to 10)

criteria.name: Dividend Continuity
criteria.description: Dividend paid in all available years

criteria.name: EPS Growth
criteria.description: EPS growth >= 33% over 10 years (comparing 3-year average endpoints)

criteria.name: Price < Graham Number
criteria.description: Current price below Graham Number (sqrt(22.5 * EPS * BV))
